'''Quinlan Vos's holocron''' was a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] made by [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. Prior to the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]], it was given to him by [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]], who believed that Vos would benefit from recording his thoughts and feelings. Strangely, it was not shaped like a traditional cubic [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] holocron, but rather like a pyramidal [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]].

Vos kept it with him throughout the campaign on [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] and in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]], where, after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], he used it to record his love for [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]]. It made its way to her eight months later on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. She was reading it on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] when Vos himself returned to her.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 74|''Republic'' 74]] {{1st}}
*[[Republic 83|''Republic'' 83]]
